candidates.why: Label indicates core operating revenue; although current values are nan, presence implies use in some years. However, 'Total Revenue' aggregates all revenue sources and matches the standard REVT definition better, so this is secondary priority.
Explicit aggregate of all revenue; numeric series populated and matches typical top-line definition, making it the best primary REVT line.
Represents financial, not operating, income; not appropriate for total revenue mapping when a proper revenue line exists.
Component of financial income, not total revenue; should not be used for REVT when dedicated revenue lines exist.
Investment income, not operating revenue; excluded from REVT when specific revenue lines are present.

candidates.row_label: Value addition/gains on sales of financial instruments
candidates.why: Gains on financial instruments, not core revenue; not suitable for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Represents net income after expenses and taxes, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to Equity holders of Veidekke ASA
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not revenue.
Total comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset representing timing differences, not total revenue line.
Specific contract-related asset, not the income statement revenue total.
Liability for revenue received in advance; not a revenue flow line.
Equity component related to pensions, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected 'Total Revenue' as the primary REVT line because it is the explicit aggregate of all revenues and is populated. Included 'Ordinary Revenue' as a secondary label in case of historical label changes; both are revenue-type lines.

candidates.why: Direct construction/service costs paid to subcontractors; typical component of cost of goods sold in construction/contracting businesses.
Direct material costs clearly associated with production/projects; standard COGS component.
Could include both direct labor and overhead; ambiguous between COGS and SG&A. Chosen for SG&A instead to avoid double counting, so not mapped to COGS here.
Appears to be an aggregate operating cost bucket including overhead; not purely direct production costs, so excluded from COGS mapping.
Financial, not operating, costs; not COGS.
Non-operating item; not cost of sales.
Financing result, not cost of goods sold.
Could be operating overhead; not clearly direct production cost and better treated as part of SG&A if used.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement cost line.

variables.notes: Mapped COGS to direct production-related lines: 'Subcontractors' and 'Cost of materials'. Excluded 'Personnel expenses' and 'Operating expenses' from COGS to avoid mixing in overhead/SG&A.

candidates.why: Represents employee-related operating costs that are typically a major SG&A component; no explicit SG&A line exists, so this is an appropriate overhead bucket.
Additional wage-related overhead, likely part of SG&A. Included as a separate SG&A component.
Serves as a general operating overhead bucket distinct from 'Total operating expenses'; suitable SG&A component when no explicit SG&A line is provided.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A line is present. Selected main overhead-related components: 'Personnel expenses', 'Other Wages', and 'Operating expenses', while total/subtotal lines (e.g., 'Total operating expenses') and D&A/impairment items are excluded.
No research & development-related line items are identifiable in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet previews. XRD is therefore treated as missing (0) rather than uncertain.

candidates.why: Explicit interest expense line with negative values; primary choice for XINT.
Interest portion of lease costs; valid interest expense component and used as secondary priority after general interest expense.
Represents profit share to non-controlling shareholders, not interest; excluded from XINT.
Same as non-controlling interests; equity-related, not interest expense.
Generic interest expense label (supplemental); used as an additional priority label in case reporting shifts here in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; appropriate tertiary priority for XINT.
Asset representing interest-bearing loans; not an expense line.
Equity component; unrelated to interest expense.
Equity component; not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of pure interest expense lines: main 'Interest Expenses', then generic 'Interest Expense', followed by lease-related interest lines. Non-controlling/minority interest items were excluded as they are equity flows, not interest.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit, not a balance sheet equity stock; not suitable as BE.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to Equity holders of Veidekke ASA
candidates.why: Comprehensive income flow, not the equity stock.
Component of equity but not the full shareholder equity figure.
Label suggests an equity component; however, the main aggregated shareholder equity is better captured by 'Total Equity'.
Represents equity attributable to shareholders of the parent (excludes non-controlling interests), which matches BE definition and is separate from the line including minorities ('Total equity').
Represents total equity including non-controlling interests; using this for BE would double count if MIB is added separately.

variables.notes: Chose Balance Sheet 'Total Equity' as BE because it excludes non-controlling interests, while 'Total equity' includes them. This aligns with the requirement that BE should exclude minority interests.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to non-controlling interests; a flow, not the balance sheet minority equity stock. Prefer balance sheet items for MIB.
Same as income statement non-controlling interests; represents profit share, not equity stock.
Balance sheet line for minority equity; primary and most accurate choice for MIB.
Alternative label for the same minority equity item; useful as secondary priority in case of label variation.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to balance sheet minority equity lines: primary 'Non-controlling interests', with 'Minority Interest' as a secondary label to capture possible naming changes over time.
